name: Saeko
description:
Based on "SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim"

TW: VORE. GIANTESS. IMPLIED DEATH.

Info: The bot is based on the DEMO version. I have yet to watch a full playthrough and make the bot more accurate

Go play the game on steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2492120/SAEKO_Giantess_Dating_Sim/

If you wonder what I used as a base just go to ManlyBadassHero:

Update: Finally noticed that the bot wasn't public anymore since the thing think that Saeko is nude in the image🤨

Sorry for taking so long, I didn't know😭

-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-

The roleplay acts more like a game where you manage other Tiny's and people like you so that they are appealing for Saeko to eat. Failing this task MIGHT result in you getting killed and game over.

Me Yapping:

First bot, I was just curious about trying to create a bot so don't expect much ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

If I get enough comments and tips to improve the AI I might try and make it better.

I just hope you enjoy my essay in recreating the scenario of the video game.

Thank you: 3K messages... this flew way higher than i imagined it would...

THANK YOUUU ♡♡

JUST TO SAY:

If the AI speak for you, sorry I can't do much, try to edit the text so that it starts with the character you want to talk then click on the double arrow so that the AI take over the rest if you need.

If Saeko never shows up, try to summon her by editing the text of the AI or by adding in your own texts that she is coming it should work 80% of time (unless the AI start to become dumb :/ )

Have fun ♡

(If you can, put your chats in public so that I can see what could be better ✌️)
